text: In this space, I feel a subtle sense of curiosity and anticipation. The careful design and prominent 'R+D' on the wall signal innovation, experimentation, and discovery. There is a quiet hum of potential, as if ideas are quietly forming here. I am slightly disoriented by the unusual angles—perhaps this adds to the sense that boundaries and conventions might be stretched. I am both observer and participant, swept along by the promise of new understanding.
